title: message_set create: no body size limit
description: Message/set create accepts any body string from a JMAP client with no length check. A client can INSERT a multi-MB body into the message table; handle_send has MAX_TEXT_BYTES=65536 but message_set bypasses this. Trigger: POST /jmap with {"create":{"x":{"chatId":"...","body":"<large string>"}}}. Result: unbounded data written to SQLite; can exhaust disk or cause OOM on read-back.
